title: Arda's Hammers [Hammer Mod]
description: It is a mod that adds many hammers to the game.
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af4fa1fa5e4a56dae1ec6c9223071b321485be28.png)
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f66d03f9630cf11aa0497b4e631f49bc8ac56808.png)
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8723a4f289e8eee87377f3077397eb7fbf398a1f_0.webp)
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd7d823d48933cde3bcb53f432f42ba78fe2899a.png)
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f66d03f9630cf11aa0497b4e631f49bc8ac56808.png)

### **Mod**
Hammers can be used while mining, just like pickaxes. However, they break blocks in a 3x3 area with a single blow, giving you incredible speed and efficiency. Now, mining or working on large construction projects is much easier and faster!

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f66d03f9630cf11aa0497b4e631f49bc8ac56808.png)

### **Craft**

- 1.21.8 Neoforge & Fabric
- 1.21.4 Neoforge
- 1.21.1 Neoforge
